<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Organisation Reference ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/developer-settings/profile/organization/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve your organisation's `encrypted_reference_id`.
This is the **first step** in the document signing workflow — the returned reference ID is required to create documents via the API.


<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-organisation-reference.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
